_mode: great_hall: fully dynamic GI, no baked lightmap (stealth-dark).
_quality: discrete-GPU high tier: pin the old engine defaults (msaa 4, aniso 16) explicitly now that the engine default is low-end-safe (2 / 4) -- rpg-96ia.
_pagecache: rpg leak fix: sdf_resident_slots sizes the fine-chunk GPU pool (12 fits every gh chunk on a discrete GPU); sdf_fp16/lm_fp16 halve chunk textures + SH pages. The _zone.sdf coarse fallback covers any page fault.
_csm: 4096 cascades: the re-export grew the scene AABB the cascades fit (chimney + dais doorway), so 1024 texels stretched too coarse -- bias-sized light gaps at the wall/floor contact read as sun leaking through the wall base.
